mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_store_points WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_store_points WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY user_id FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_store_points( user_id, store_id, points, frozen_points, version, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{points}, #{frozenPoints}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_store_points SET points = #{points}, frozen_points = #{frozenPoints}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT ranked.user_id, ranked.nickname, ranked.avatar, ranked.points, ranked.rank_no AS `rank` FROM ( SELECT usp.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, usp.points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY usp.points DESC, usp.user_id) AS rank_no FROM user_store_points usp JOIN `user` u ON u.id = usp.user_id AND u.status = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE usp.store_id = #{storeId} AND usp.deleted = 0 ) ranked ORDER BY ranked.rank_no LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ranked.user_id, ranked.nickname, ranked.avatar, ranked.points, ranked.rank_no AS `rank` FROM ( SELECT usp.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, usp.points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY usp.points DESC, usp.user_id) AS rank_no FROM user_store_points usp JOIN `user` u ON u.id = usp.user_id AND u.status = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE usp.store_id = #{storeId} AND usp.deleted = 0 ) ranked WHERE ranked.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT usp.user_id, MAX(u.nickname) AS nickname, MAX(u.avatar) AS avatar, MAX(u.phone) AS phone, MAX(u.status) AS status, COALESCE(SUM(usp.points), 0) AS total_points, COALESCE(SUM(usp.frozen_points), 0) AS frozen_points, COUNT(*) AS store_count, MAX(usp.update_time) AS last_change_time FROM user_store_points usp LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = usp.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY usp.user_id ORDER BY total_points DESC, usp.user_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT usp.user_id FROM user_store_points usp LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = usp.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY usp.user_id ) grouped
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_points_request( store_id, user_id, type, points, remark, status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{points}, #{remark}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store_points_request WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE store_points_request SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, before_points = #{beforePoints}, after_points = #{afterPoints}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_points_log( store_id, user_id, change_type, change_value, before_value, after_value, biz_no, operator, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userId}, #{changeType}, #{changeValue}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{bizNo}, #{operator}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT spl.*, u.nickname, u.phone FROM store_points_log spl LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = spl.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY spl.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_points_log spl WHERE
